de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts

Class InstantiateCommand

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.AbstractCommand<InstantiateCommand.Parameters>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.InstantiateCommand
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofScriptCommand<InstantiateCommand.Parameters>

    public class InstantiateCommand
extends AbstractCommand<InstantiateCommand.Parameters>
    instantiate var=a occ=2 with="a_8" hide

    instantiate formula="\forall int a; phi(a)" with="a_8"

      • execute

        public void execute(AbstractUserInterfaceControl uiControl,
                    InstantiateCommand.Parameters params,
                    EngineState state)
             throws ScriptException,
                    java.lang.InterruptedException
        Specified by:
        execute in interface ProofScriptCommand<InstantiateCommand.Parameters>
        Overrides:
        execute in class AbstractCommand<InstantiateCommand.Parameters>
        Parameters:
        uiControl - the current ui controller
        params - the script arguments
        state - the current state
        Throws:
        ScriptException - if something bad happens
        java.lang.InterruptedException - if something bad happens

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Description copied from interface: ProofScriptCommand
        Returns the name of this proof command. The name should be constant and not be clash with the name of other commands. The name is essential for finding this command within an hashmap.
        Returns:
        a non-null, non-empty string
        See Also:
        ProofScriptEngine
